question: Will Labour announce a leadership election before 1st June 2026?
reason: Multiple Labour figures have publicly declared intentions to challenge Starmer's leadership before June 1.
evidence: Wes Streeting confirmed he will stand in any Labour leadership race.
Andy Burnham announced plans to request permission to stand in a by-election, paving the way for his return to the House of Commons.
Labour-supporting unions predict Starmer will not lead the party into the next election.
Calls for Starmer's resignation have been made by over 90 MPs.
Streeting is preparing to resign and announce a bid for Starmer's job.
Burnham's backers are lobbying Labour’s NEC to hold an extended leadership election to give him time to return to parliament and win a by-election.
